stemHtml: Which of the following statements about a radar advisory service is true?

options.a: Such service is only provided on and in close proximity to aerodromes.
options.b: Clearances are provided to increase safety in controlled airspaces.
options.c: The pilot must consider that the controller is not aware of all traffic within their airspace.
options.d: Such service is only provided for controlled aircraft in upper airspace.
